subject: A bald warrior in white plate armor swings a hand axe overhead while surrounded by small goblin-like creatures clawing and grasping at them from all sides
description: A stocky bald humanoid warrior in white-grey plate armor stands at the center of the composition, mouth open in a shout, raising a hand axe overhead with both hands gripping the weapon. Around them, multiple small goblin-type creatures swarm — several visible at the bottom and sides, clawed hands grasping toward the warrior. At least one larger dark figure looms at the upper right. The background shows pale columns or stonework partially visible. The scene conveys being outnumbered but unbowed.
foreground: Bald warrior in white plate raising a hand axe, surrounded by small goblins
emotion: Defiant fury — the warrior's open mouth and raised weapon read as a battle cry against overwhelming odds
